name: Ulker Biskuvi Sanayi A.S.
summary: √É¬úlker Bisk√É¬ºvi Sanayi A.S., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the manufacture, marketing, and sale of chocolates, chocolate-coated biscuits, biscuits, cakes, wafers, and crackers in Turkey. It is also involved in the trading and investment activities. It offers its products under the various company owned brands, as well as private labels. The company exports its products to the Middle East, Russia, and Central Asian republics, as well as to Europe, Africa, and the United States. √É¬úlker Bisk√É¬ºvi Sanayi A.S. was founded in 1944 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. √É¬úlker Bisk√É¬ºvi Sanayi A.S. is a subsidiary of pladis Foods Limited.
